scripts.dev:web: cross-env PORT=5173 BASE_PATH=/ pnpm --filter @workspace/caige run dev
scripts.dev:all: concurrently -n api,web -c blue,green "pnpm run dev:api" "pnpm run dev:web"
scripts.build: pnpm run typecheck && pnpm -r --if-present run build
scripts.typecheck: pnpm run typecheck:libs && pnpm -r --filter "./artifacts/**" --filter "./scripts" --if-present run typecheck
